scenarios.name: Add a New Agent for Code Review
scenarios.description: Create a new agent that reviews Python code quality, following the plugin directory structure, agent frontmatter conventions, and detect-verify-execute workflow pattern

scenarios.name: Modify the Commit Hook to Support Monorepos
scenarios.description: Update the suggest-optimize.sh script to detect Python changes in monorepo subdirectories and modify hooks.json to add a configuration parameter

scenarios.name: Add Package Manager Support for Conda
scenarios.description: Extend the plugin to support conda as a package manager, updating the agent workflow, hook script runner detection, and plugin manifest
